steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Test FTP service for anonymous login without credentials
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for service exploitation quick reference
steps.expected_output: Confirmed anonymous FTP access with listing of accessible files and directories

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Enumerate SMB shares using null session without requiring credentials
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: List of available shares and permissions confirming null session vulnerability

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Perform SSH brute force attack using Hydra with credential wordlists
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Valid SSH credentials discovered through brute force attack

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Check cirt.net/passwords for known default credentials on identified services
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Matched default credentials for specific service versions

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Use searchsploit to identify known exploits for discovered service versions
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: List of available exploits with descriptions and references

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Search Metasploit for suitable exploit modules matching target services
steps.expected_output: Applicable Metasploit modules with relevant exploit code and payloads

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Document all access gained including usernames, permissions, and data accessed
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive access log showing all compromised accounts and their capabilities
